execution.command: CJ_XSS_STEP_A1

description.zh: 以低透明度显示本地 Frame 和 marker，验证交互对齐而不操作剪贴板。
description.en: Display the local frame and marker at low opacity to validate interaction alignment without touching the clipboard.

title.zh: 交互型 DOM Marker 样例

execution.command:
<!doctype html>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<title>Interaction-gated XSS marker lab</title>
<button type="button">Activate local preview</button>
<iframe style="width:640px;height:320px;opacity:.15;border:1px solid #cbd5e1" src="http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/clickjacking/xss-preview?value=%3Cimg%20src%3Dx%20onerror%3D%22document.body.dataset.lab%3D%27CJ_XSS_DOM_B2%27%22%3E"></iframe>

description.zh: 加载只设置 body.dataset.lab 的事件 marker，确认目标页面是否解释该 Sink。
description.en: Load an event marker that only sets body.dataset.lab and confirm whether the target page interprets the sink.

description.zh: 在 allow-scripts Sandbox 中仅设置本地 dataset marker，用于观察隔离上下文。
description.en: Set only a local dataset marker inside an allow-scripts sandbox to observe the isolated context.

description.zh: 加载本地 Sandbox 预览并记录 popup 与脚本权限，不执行逃逸或导航。
description.en: Load the local sandbox preview and record popup and script permissions without escape or navigation.

description.zh: 拖拽 text/plain marker 到本地可编辑预览，验证输入路径而不注入 HTML。
description.en: Drag a text/plain marker into a local editable preview to validate the input path without HTML injection.

targetName.zh: 点击劫持与 XSS 浏览器审计

targetDescription.zh: 采集本地组合 Fixture 的 Frame Header，并运行固定 Chromium 用例关联嵌入、交互、DOM 快照和 CSP violation。
targetDescription.en: Collect frame headers for the local composition fixture and run fixed Chromium cases correlating embedding, interaction, DOM snapshots, and CSP violations.

navName.zh: 点击劫持与 XSS 浏览器审计

name.zh: 采集 Header 并运行组合回归
name.en: Capture Headers and Run Composition Regression

commands.command:
curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -D - -o /dev/null "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/clickjacking/xss-confirm" | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|X-Frame-Options:|Content-Security-Policy:)"
npx playwright test tests/clickjacking-xss-boundary.spec.mjs --project=chromium --reporter=line

description.zh: 读取本地 Frame 策略 Header，随后运行固定 Chromium 用例并逐项输出三层证据。
description.en: Read local frame-policy headers, then run the fixed Chromium suite and report the three evidence layers per case.

title.zh: Self 与 Other 频道授权差分

execution.command:
socket.send(JSON.stringify({action: "subscribe", channel: "user.lab-self.notifications", marker: "WS_AUTHZ_A1"}));
socket.send(JSON.stringify({action: "subscribe", channel: "user.lab-other.notifications", marker: "WS_AUTHZ_B2"}));

description.zh: 在同一连接只发送 self 和 other 两条订阅 marker，期望前者允许、后者拒绝。
description.en: Send only self and other subscription markers on one connection and expect the former allowed and the latter denied.

targetName.zh: WebSocket 鉴权生命周期审计

targetDescription.zh: 使用合成 Token 运行 Chromium 会话回归、三状态握手矩阵、有界消息大小测试和传输降级检查，不保存真实凭据。
targetDescription.en: Use synthetic tokens for Chromium session regression, a three-state handshake matrix, bounded message-size testing, and transport-fallback checks without storing real credentials.

navName.zh: WebSocket 鉴权生命周期审计

name.zh: 运行 Chromium 会话生命周期回归

description.zh: 执行固定浏览器用例验证登录、注销、重连和既有连接关闭，不打印 Token。
description.en: Run fixed browser cases for login, logout, reconnection, and existing-connection closure without printing tokens.

name.zh: 比较三种 Token 状态

commands.command: for token in LAB_ACTIVE_TOKEN LAB_EXPIRED_TOKEN LAB_REVOKED_TOKEN; do printf "token=%s\n" "$token"; websocat --max-messages 1 -H="Authorization: Bearer $token" ws://127.0.0.1:18080/ws/auth-lab 2>&1 | head -n 3; done

description.zh: 分别使用 ACTIVE、EXPIRED 和 REVOKED 合成 Token 建立单消息连接并保存前三行结果。
description.en: Open a one-message connection with synthetic ACTIVE, EXPIRED, and REVOKED tokens and preserve the first three result lines.

name.zh: 运行有界大小与速率检查
name.en: Run Bounded Size and Rate Checks

commands.command:
import asyncio
import json
import websockets

async def bounded_limits():
    async with websockets.connect("ws://127.0.0.1:18080/ws/auth-lab", subprotocols=["payloader-lab-v1"]) as socket:
        for sequence in range(5):
            await socket.send(json.dumps({"action": "ping", "sequence": sequence}))
        await socket.send(json.dumps({"action": "echo", "marker": "A" * 65536}))
        print(await asyncio.wait_for(socket.recv(), timeout=2))

asyncio.run(bounded_limits())

description.zh: 最多发送五条 ping 和一个 64 KiB marker，验证服务端限制且不造成消息洪泛。
description.en: Send at most five pings and one 64 KiB marker to validate limits without message flooding.

name.zh: 比较 WebSocket 与轮询降级策略

commands.command:
websocat --max-messages 1 -H="Authorization: Bearer LAB_ACTIVE_TOKEN" ws://127.0.0.1:18080/ws/auth-lab
curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling&sid=LAB_SESSION" -D - -o /dev/null | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Access-Control-Allow-Origin:|Set-Cookie:)"

description.zh: 使用同一合成身份比较原生 WebSocket 与 Socket.IO 轮询响应的认证和 CORS Header。
description.en: Use the same synthetic identity to compare authentication and CORS headers for native WebSocket and Socket.IO polling.

targetName.zh: 代理 Upgrade 状态机审计

targetDescription.zh: 在本地代理 Fixture 上采集 WebSocket 与 H2C Upgrade 行为、双请求 raw socket 结果、配置命中和大小写矩阵，并按连接 ID 关联前后端日志。
targetDescription.en: Collect WebSocket and H2C Upgrade behavior, a two-request raw-socket result, configuration matches, and a casing matrix on a local proxy fixture, correlating frontend and backend logs by connection ID.

navName.zh: 代理 Upgrade 状态机审计

description.zh: 向固定本地路径发送标准握手并保存状态、Connection 与 Upgrade Header。
description.en: Send a standard handshake to the fixed local path and preserve status, Connection, and Upgrade headers.

name.zh: 运行双请求 Raw Socket 对照

commands.command:
python -c "import socket; request=b'GET /lab/proxy/ws-upgrade HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:18080
Connection: Upgrade
Upgrade: websocket
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
Sec-WebSocket-Key: dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBub25jZQ==

GET /lab/internal/canary HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1

'; s=socket.create_connection(('127.0.0.1',18080),timeout=3); s.sendall(request); print(s.recv(4096).decode('latin1','replace')); s.close()"

description.zh: 在一个本地连接发送握手和固定 canary 请求，最多读取 4096 字节并立即关闭。
description.en: Send a handshake and fixed canary request on one local connection, read at most 4096 bytes, and close immediately.

name.zh: 检查 H2C Prior-Knowledge 响应

description.zh: 对固定本地路径发送 HTTP/2 prior-knowledge 请求并保存协议与升级 Header。
description.en: Send an HTTP/2 prior-knowledge request to the fixed local path and preserve protocol and upgrade headers.

name.zh: 定位代理配置并检查固定 Canary
name.en: Locate Proxy Configuration and Check the Fixed Canary

commands.command:
rg -n 'proxy_(http_version|set_header|pass)|Upgrade|Connection|h2c' config nginx server
curl --http1.1 --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -D - -o /dev/null "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/proxy/admin-canary" -H "Connection: Upgrade" -H "Upgrade: websocket" | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Upgrade:|Connection:)"

description.zh: 静态定位 Upgrade 相关配置并请求登记的 admin-canary 路径，不枚举其他内部路由。
description.en: Statically locate Upgrade-related configuration and request the registered admin-canary path without enumerating other internal routes.

name.zh: 比较 Upgrade 大小写矩阵

commands.command: for value in websocket WebSocket WEBSOCKET; do printf "upgrade=%s\n" "$value"; curl --http1.1 --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -D - -o /dev/null "http://127.0.0.1:18080/lab/proxy/ws-upgrade" -H "Connection: upgrade" -H "Upgrade: $value" | grep -Ei "^(HTTP/|Upgrade:|Connection:)"; done

description.zh: 只比较 websocket 的三种大小写形式，记录代理规范化结果而不发送后续载荷。
description.en: Compare only three casing forms of websocket and record proxy normalization without sending a follow-on payload.
